library(fixest)       # Для быстрых регрессий и кластеризованных ошибок
# Создаем переменную для кластеризации: school_grade для CPS/CH, class для Bloom
# fixest сам создаст дамми для факторных переменных.
mod1 <- feols(current_score_t ~ INF + INH + INT + INLH + INLT +
i(district, session) + i(district, grade) + i(district, school) +
i(district, baseline) + i(district, baseline_sq) + i(district, baseline_cub) + i(district, missing_baseline),
# Модель 2 - с расширенной демографией и историей
mod2 <- feols(current_score_t ~ INF + INH + INT + INLH + INLT +
i(district, session) + i(district, grade) + i(district, school) +
i(district, baseline) + i(district, baseline_sq) + i(district, baseline_cub) + i(district, missing_baseline) +
i(district, black) + i(district, hispanic) + i(district, unknown_race) +
i(district, female) + i(district, gender_unknown) + i(district, free_reduced) +
